sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Leitungah khua mial lungkham na dim a
Khua vaakin nitaan na zong om ta
Lungkhamna khuamial sung na om khakle
Nitaang sung zong om thei ding hi teh
Nitaang sung ah nungta dih in
Tawntung nuam na sa ding hi
Na lam hong taang sak ding hi
Sanggam aw nitaang sungah om dih in

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Huihpi'n ih kimkot teng a nuai hang in
Lametna teng hong bei sak hang in
Huihpi leh guahpite veng pak na ve
Khuamial in lau na tam hang sa ni

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Lametna tawh nisim in lasa ni
Khuamial in lau na tam hang sa ni
Tawntung Honpa mai ih muak den kei le
I vekpi in honghuai ding hi veh.
